reviews.school_name: RSS International school - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: kashyap G rajput
reviews.review_body: This is very bad place. Please don't go to study there. Fees of this school is very high compare to near by school. There is also very bad teacher they take teacher with low salary and they didn't teach as good. Don't waste time to go this school and help everyone to not take admission in that school. Save future of any student.

reviews.school_name: RSS International school - GAUTAM BUDDHA NAGAR
reviews.author: Aakash narula
reviews.review_body:
The staff and principal are highly unprofessional.
They act like working in a samosa or a bhajia shop rather than an institution. Neither any commitments, nor any norms followed. They hired my sister as a PGT and on the first day, they changed their stance and refused their own commitment.

Be aware if you are also looking to work in this bhajia shop. I have been working too since last few years and never ever witnessed such kind of unprofessionalism in a school.

What will they teach their students if the management lacks integrity and probity itself?
